ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "general_size" TEXT /* General size description (e.g., X-Small, Small) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US clothing size range */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU clothing size range */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK clothing size range */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size range if applicable */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing category (e.g., Women, Men, Kids) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "bust_inches" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "outseam_inches" TEXT /* Outseam measurement in inches */,
  "rise_inches" TEXT /* Rise measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse name) */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the inventory item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the inventory item */,
  "item_color" TEXT /* Color of the inventory item */,
  "item_material" TEXT /* Material of the inventory item */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the inventory item */,
  "item_discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage on the inventory item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the inventory item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description of size guide tips and fitting information */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Relaxed) */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size guide entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "bust_inches" TEXT /* User's bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inches" TEXT /* User's waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_inches" TEXT /* User's hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_inches" TEXT /* User's shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_inches" TEXT /* User's sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_inches" TEXT /* User's inseam measurement in inches */,
  "outseam_inches" TEXT /* User's outseam measurement in inches */,
  "rise_inches" TEXT /* User's rise measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user measurement entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_workflow" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Approval status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the approver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval was granted or rejected */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the approval or rejection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_workflow_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)
